body: {"rationale":"Bead has a clear imperative title and inlines the duplication problem, but fails most rubric criteria: AC is a prose paragraph (not numbered), names no Test* functions, omits the mandatory `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./...` and `lefthook run pre-commit` gate lines, gives no DDx file:line root cause (only references a HELIX-side script), lacks a kind:* label and any adr/spec cross-refs, and does not state parent or deps. Acceptance is not machine-measurable (`uses the same selection semantics`, `documents close-with-evidence expectations`) which is ironic given the bead's own subject. A cold sub-agent could not pick a file to edit or a test to run from this body.","score":2,"suggested_fixes":["Add ROOT CAUSE with concrete DDx path:line (e.g., the file implementing `ddx bead ready --execution` selection) plus PROPOSED FIX naming the new command/check surface (e.g., `ddx bead lint --execution-ready` or extend `ddx bead ready --execution --strict`) and a NON-SCOPE clause excluding HELIX-side removal","Convert AC into a numbered list with verifiable assertions, e.g. 1) `ddx bead ready --execution --strict` exits non-zero when any execution-ready bead has non-measurable AC; 2) measurability check rejects ACs lacking a `Test*`/`go test -run` token or shell-verifiable assertion; 3) close-with-evidence requirement is enforced by `ddx bead close` refusing to close without evidence pointer; 4) new behavior covered by `TestBeadReadyStrictRejectsNonMeasurable` and `TestBeadCloseRequiresEvidence`","Name the Test* functions and packages explicitly (e.g., `cli/internal/bead/ready_strict_test.go::TestBeadReadyStrictRejectsNonMeasurable`)","Append the mandatory gate lines: `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/... green` and `lefthook run pre-commit passes`","Add `kind:feature` label and cross-refs to the governing spec/ADR (e.g., the queue-readiness spec, P7 reliability principle)","State parent (likely the queue/tracker epic) and deps (or `no deps`) explicitly","Define `machine-measurable` and `close-with-evidence` inline (one-sentence each) so the executing agent does not have to infer the semantics from HELIX docs"],"waivers_applied":[]}
